name: ux
displayName: UX — the design intelligence plugin for Claude Code
description: The strongest UX plugin ever made for Claude Code. 17 callable slash commands, 5 specialized sub-agents, and 30+ reference files covering every dimension of digital product UX: review, audit, generate, motion, copy, accessibility, design systems, dashboards, case studies. Grounded in the canon (Norman, Krug, Lean UX, 30 Laws of UX, Creative Selection), trained on patterns from 21+ premium SaaS sites, and built to defeat AI-aesthetic biases. Works on any stack — React, Next.js, Vue, Blade, vanilla. Cross-system. Anti-AI-slop by default.
